title: the normal real hood ghetto stuff (even realer edition)
description: where queers come to play normal minecraft, featuring create, exploration and transgenderism :3
body:
![A banner containing the name of the modpack and a quote, which reads : "a normal modpack for normal people" - jesús cristo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0f70bd922cdacf1a4299521be571ce79e74200c_0.webp) ## the boniest modpack in the west aka normal minecraft modpack !! a bloated amalgamation of mods for 1.20.1, based on Fabric. why ? because we were bored and wanted to mine it, and by it, I mean my craft, multiplayer style. it's not _**fancy pants ultra rpg modpack 3000 mega super edition with john the dragon and interplanetary bossfights**_, just a little modpack with things we liked, things we loved, and things we hated but were a little funny. technically not quite a vanilla modpack nor a vanilla+ one, just a different kind of bland and disappointing ice cream flavour, a chocolate modpack, i suppose.  ## what's in yer cans of worms mr bones ? - create stuff, featuring transgenderism (swags) - way too many biome mods, or as we call it "a refined exploration experience" - furniture and decoration - the piss dimension (there are no bees in this modpack. this is a psyop.) - long loading times - woke dog - origins, with therianism, licanthropy, weird plague victim and a fish i guess - cobblemon, cobblenom and cans of worms - alcohol. lots of alcohol. and it's laced with estrogen. and also alcoholism. and also also horse piss. we love horse piss in this house. - carlos is it optimised or stable ? nuh huh, but ime ;; only a little cat writing this out,, donte be mean;;; ## listen to what the critics have to say : « j »
« why are you keeping me in here i already answered all of your questions let me go i beg of you »
« update already goddamn it »
« haha ;; cube »
« what the fuck is wrong with the meat block »
## meet the team : [milo "miloet" milo it's milo "melody" racoon](https://www.istockphoto.com/en/photo/little-raccoon-on-tree-gm514622028-88185477)
[the morgster, the boogaliser, the evil feline, mastermind of all the slaughtering, terrorism and dubious decisions](https://www.google.com/)
if you have any requests or suggestions, don't hesitate to send the malevolent beast some hatemail over here in the comments or on my cool email adress : [therealhoodghettoshit@proton.me](mailto:therealhoodghettoshit@proton.me) ## notes !! just drag all the ressourcepacks from the folder in the datapack folder, should work perfectly :3
